infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: EchoEcho needs your location to provide turn-by-turn navigation.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: EchoEcho needs background location to continue guiding you between buildings.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: EchoEcho uses motion sensors for improved indoor positioning.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: EchoEcho uses the microphone to listen for your spoken destination.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: EchoEcho uses speech recognition to understand your destination.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: EchoEcho needs location access to navigate campus.

plugins.microphonePermission: EchoEcho uses the microphone to listen for your spoken destination.
plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: EchoEcho uses speech recognition to understand your destination.
